title: Windows Scheduled Task Created or Updated
description: Detects Security Event IDs 4698 and 4702 for scheduled tasks created or modified with suspicious task names or executable actions.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' in ('4698', '4702') and ('Task Name' like '*Update*' or 'Task Name' like '*Cache*' or 'Command Line' like '*powershell*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Temp\\*' or 'Command Line' like '*\\Users\\Public\\*' or msg like '*Task Name*') | stats count as TaskChanges, unique('Task Name') as Tasks, unique('Command Line') as Commands by User, 'Host Name (Server)', Entity | sort -TaskChanges
falsepositives: Software deployment tools and endpoint management platforms creating scheduled maintenance tasks

references.name: Microsoft Learn: 4698(S) A scheduled task was created
Microsoft Learn: 4702(S) A scheduled task was updated
